Container.Name: playtorrio-web
Container.Overview: PlayTorrio **web** build (experimental): browse Stremio/TMDB-style UI in a browser. Served by nginx inside the container. **Image:** This template defaults to `playtorrio-web:latest` on the **local** Docker engine. Build it on Unraid (SSH or terminal) from a clone of the repo: `docker build -f docker/web/Dockerfile -t playtorrio-web:latest .` If you publish the image to Docker Hub or GHCR, change **Repository** below (e.g. `youruser/playtorrio-web:latest`).

Config.Name: Web UI port
Config.Description: HTTP port (host 8089 → container 80). Change host side if 8089 is in use.
